issues_found: Source is a container/landing page, not the actual report content - contains only summary statistics and navigation links
URL is blank - source cannot be verified or revisited
Lacks substantive policy analysis - only high-level summary metrics present
Archive value is too low - no actual ECB policy analysis or detailed assessment
Rule 8 violation: source is a landing page/navigation page which must not be accepted
Published_at date (2024) refers to the report year, not the page publication date
human_review_reason: The record itself correctly identifies this as a container/landing page with thin content. No human review needed because the issues are determinative - this is explicitly the type of page that must be rejected per verification rules.

corrected_fields.summary: Landing/navigation page for ECB Annual Report 2024 containing only summary statistics (2.4% inflation, -100bp rate cuts to 3.00% deposit facility rate) and links to the full report. No substantive policy analysis present.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page has no independent archive value - it is merely a navigation hub to the actual report, speech, and financial accounts. The summary statistics are verifiable but too thin to constitute a useful research record.
corrected_fields.macro_context: ECB cut rates 100 basis points across four meetings in 2024, reducing deposit facility rate to 3.00%, while headline inflation declined from 2.9% to 2.4%. These are summary metrics only, not substantive policy analysis.
